barb.label: Frenzy Barbarian

items.name: Annihilus
items.note: +1 skills, +10-20 stats, +10-20 res, +5-10% XP. Always carry one.

items.name: Barbarian Torch
items.note: +3 Barb skills, +10-20 stats, +10-20 res. Massive power boost.

items.name: +1 Warcries skillers
items.note: Boosts Battle Orders duration and power for both characters

items.name: +1 Combat skillers
items.note: Directly boosts Frenzy and Double Swing synergy damage

items.name: +1 Masteries skillers
items.note: Boosts weapon mastery and natural resistances

items.name: With +life suffix
items.note: Best suffix is +40-45 life. +FHR is also good until you hit the 86% breakpoint.

items.name: 20 life / 5 all res
items.note: The holy grail small charm — fill remaining slots with these

items.name: 20 life / 11 fire res (or other single res)
items.note: Stack whichever resistance you're lowest on

items.name: 3 max / 20 AR / 20 life
items.note: Damage small charms if you're already res-capped

items.name: 5 FHR / 11 res
items.note: Until you hit 86% FHR breakpoint

items.name: 7 MF small charms
items.note: Swap in for MF runs when you don't need survivability

barb.notes: Priority: Torch + Anni first. Then stack Warcries skillers (BO benefits both of you). Fill remaining space with life/res small charms. Carry a second set of MF charms for easy farming zones.

zon.label: Java Amazon

items.name: Annihilus
items.note: +1 skills, +10-20 stats, +10-20 res, +5-10% XP. Non-negotiable.

items.name: Amazon Torch
items.note: +3 Amazon skills, +10-20 stats, +10-20 res. Huge LF and CS damage boost.

items.name: +1 Javelin & Spear skillers
items.note: THE priority — each one adds massive lightning damage to LF and CS

items.name: With +life suffix
items.note: +40-45 life is best. +FHR also valuable until 48% or 86% breakpoint.

items.name: Aim for 7-9 Java skillers
items.note: Fill as many grand charm slots as possible with these

items.name: 20 life / 5 all res
items.note: Best all-around small charm for any build

items.name: 20 life / 11 lightning res
items.note: Prioritize lightning res to survive Souls in WSK

items.name: 5 FHR / 11 res
items.note: FHR matters — getting hit-locked while throwing javelins is death

items.name: 3 max / 20 AR / 20 life
items.note: Helps Jab damage against Lightning Immunes

items.name: 7 MF small charms
items.note: Swap set for cow runs and easy farming

zon.notes: Java skillers are your #1 priority after Torch + Anni. Each skiller is a noticeable damage increase to Lightning Fury. Stack as many as you can (up to 9). Fill remaining slots with life/res small charms. The Zon benefits more from +skills than any other stat.

necro.label: Manfred the Necromancer

items.name: Annihilus
items.note: +1 skills, +10-20 stats, +10-20 res, +5-10% XP. Essential for every build.

items.name: Necromancer Torch
items.note: +3 Necromancer skills, +10-20 stats, +10-20 res. Boosts skeletons, revives, CE, and curses all at once.

items.name: +1 Summoning skillers
items.note: Top priority — each one adds more skeleton damage, skeleton life, and revive count. Stack as many as possible.

items.name: +1 Poison & Bone skillers
items.note: Increases Corpse Explosion radius. 1-2 of these noticeably improve CE clear speed.

items.name: With +life suffix
items.note: +40-45 life is the best suffix. Necros have no Battle Orders, so extra life from charms matters even more.

items.name: 20 life / 5 all res
items.note: Best all-around small charm — fill remaining inventory with these

items.name: 20 life / 11 fire res (or other single res)
items.note: Stack whichever resistance you're short on to hit max in Hell

items.name: 5 FHR / 11 res
items.note: Faster Hit Recovery keeps you alive if something reaches you through your army

items.name: 7 MF small charms
items.note: Swap set for easy farming — summoner necro can MF safely since minions do the work

necro.notes: Torch + Anni first, then stack Summoning skillers to maximize skeleton army power. Mix in 1-2 Poison & Bone skillers to widen Corpse Explosion radius for faster clear. Fill remaining space with life/res small charms — without Battle Orders, every point of life and resistance from charms is critical.
